quality.rationale: 平直时空度规下基于基灵矢量的多步守恒律证明，含散度定理应用与庞加莱生成元物理诠释

origin.question: 10.13. Given a divergenceless stress energy tensor in flat spacetime, i.e.$$\mathrm {T}_{; \nu}^{\mu \nu} = 0 \quad \mathrm {R}_{\alpha \beta \gamma \delta} = 0$$show that one may construct ten global conservation laws and hence ten conserved quantities.
origin.answer: 构造十个守恒流 $J^{\mu}_{(\mathbf{i})} = T^{\mu\nu}\xi_{(\mathbf{i})\nu}$ 及守恒荷 $Q_{(i)} = \int |g|^{1/2} J^0_{(i)} d^3x$，在渐近边界条件下满足 $\frac{dQ_{(i)}}{dt} = 0$。
